/CAL:WI 6600 PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/DAWT/WIT SWORN:DR HY MALINEK/ARG&SUB//X:THE MATTER CAME BEFORE THE COURT FOR A PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING ON 10-08-13 & 01-07-14,  ON EACH OCCASION, THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT PRESENT AND WAS REPRESENTED BY RICHARD SHIKMAN, ESQ, THE PETITIONER WAS REPRESENTED BY KIMBERLY TONEY-WILLIAMS, ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY,/X:BASED ON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT FINDS THERE IS PROBABLE  CAUSE TO BELIEVE THAT THE RESPONDENT HAS BEEN CONVICTED OF A QUALIFYING SEXUALLY VIOLENT OFFENSE AGAINST ATLEAST ONE VICTIM; HAS A DIAGNOSABLE MENTAL DISORDER; THE DISORDER MAKES ITLIKELY HE WILL ENGAGE IN SEXUALLY VIOLENT CRIMINAL CONDUCT IF RELEASED; ANDTHIS SEXUALLY VIOLENT CONDUCT WILL BE PREDATORY IN NATURE,/X:RESPONDENT REQUESTS A JURY TRIAL, THE COURT HEREBY ORDERS THAT A TRIAL BE CONDUCTED TODETERMINE WHETHER RESPONDENT IS, BY REASON OF A DIAGNOSED MENTAL DISORDER,A DANGER TO THE HEALTH AND SAFETY OF OTHERS IN THAT HE IS LIKELY TO ENGAGEIN ACTS OF PREDATORY SEXUAL VIOLENCE  UPON HIS RELEASE FROM A SECURE FACILITY,/X:IT IS FURTHER ORDER THAT THE RESPONDENT REMAIN IN CUSTODY UNTIL THE TRIAL IS COMPLETED,   SPECIFICALLY, RESPONDENT SHALL REMAIN AT EITHER COALINGA STATE HOSPITAL OR ANY OTHER DESIGNATED CALIFORNIA STATE HOSPITAL OR INSTITUTION PENDING TRIAL IN THIS MATTER,/CONTD:TO SET WI 6600 PROBABLE CAUSE JURY TRIAL/

/CAL:WI 6600 PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/DAWT/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT #1 - 31 PAGE WIC 6600 RECOMMITMENT EVALUATION REPORT, CERTIFIED DATE 07-14-10/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT #2 - 6 PAGE WIC 6600 RECOMMITMENT EVALUATION UPDATEREPOET, CERTIFIED DATE 06-12-12/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT #3 - 25 PAGE SEXUALLY VIOLENT PREDATOR CIVIL COMMITMENT REPORT, CERTIFIED DATE 07-14-10/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT #4 - 7 PAGE WIC 6600 RECOMMITMENT EVALUATION UPDATEREPORT, CERTIFIED DATE 06-12-12/WIT SWORN:DR ROBERT OWENS/CONTD:01-07-14 BIFURCATED WI 6600 PROB CAUSE HRG/
/CAL:TO SET WI 6600 PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/DAWT/X:DEFENSE ATTORNEY MARK NICCO REQUEST TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD/MO GRTD/CTAPPTS:RICHARD SHIKMAN/CONT/

/CAL:TO SET WI 6600 PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/DAWT/X:DEFENSE ATTORNEY MAKES AN ORAL REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE/X:COURT TENTATIVELY SETS 09-12-12 AND 09-17-12 HEARING DATES/CONTD:TO SET WI 6600 PROB CSE HRG & CONFIRM SEPT DATES/

/CAL: HEARING ON 6600WI MOTIONS/X: THE COURT EXPRESSES THE OPINION THAT THE RONJI CASE REQUIRES THAT NEW EVALUATIONS BE MADE OF THIS DEFENDANT ACCORDING TO THE NEWLY APPROVED CRITERIA,/X: THE COURT THINKS THERE IS NO AUTHORITY TO DEMAND NEW EVALUATORS BE ASSIGNED TO DO THE NEW EVALUATIONS,/X: THECOURT WILL NOT VACATE ANY PREVIOUS PROBABLE CAUSE FINDINGS AT THIS TIME,//X: NO PREVIOUS EVALUATIONS WILL BE STRICKEN AT THIS TIME,/CTORD: NEW EVALUATIONS SHALL BE MADE ACCORDING TO THE CURRENT CRITERIA ANDNEW PROBABLE CAUSE HEARINGS WILL BE HELD FOR THIS DEFENDANT/X: THE SCOPE OF THE NEWLY ORDERED EVALUATIONS AND HEARINGS SHALL BE UNLIMITED, AS IF THERE HAD BEEN NO PREVIOUS EVALUATION, HEARING, OR FINDING,/CONTD: TO SET PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING RE 6600WI/

/CAL: TO SET 6600WI HEARING/X: THE PEOPLE WILL FILE A REQUEST FOR NEW EVALUATIONS TO BE CREATED ACCORDING TO THE CURRENT PROTOCOL,/X: THE DEFENSE WILL REQUEST THAT THE NEW EVALUATIONS BE CREATED BY NEW ANDDIFFERENT EVALUATORS,/CONTD: 6600WI MOTIONS/
/X:THIS MATTER WAS HEARD BEFORE JUDGE MOSCONE WITH CYNTHIA MARCOPULOS REPORTING,/CAL:TO SET PETITION TO EXTEND 6604WI COMMITMENT/CONTD:TO SET PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/

/X:THIS MATTER WAS HEARD BEFORE JUDGE TSENIN,/CAL:PETITION TO EXTEND COMMITMENT 6604WI/NP/DEF:IN COALINGA STATE HOSPITAL/X:IRA BARG ENTERS MOTION TO WITHDRAW,/MO GRTD/X:IRA BARG IS RELIEVED,/CTAPPTS:MARK NICCO/

/NP/X:DEFENDANT IS AT ATASCADERO STATE HOSPITAL,/CAL:TO SET 6605(B)WI HEARING/X:THE COURT REVIEWS THE ANNUAL SVP REPORT DATED 04-11-06,/X:AND THELETTER FROM ASH DATED 05-12-06 WITH PETITION FOR CONDITIONAL RELEASE UNDER6608WI,/X:THE PARTIES SUBMIT,/X:THE COURT DOES NOT FIND PROBABLE CAUSE TOBELIEVE MR BROWN'S CONDITION HAS SO CHANGED THAT HE WOULD NO LONGER BE A DANGER TO THE HEALTH AND SAFETY OF OTHERS IF DISCHARGED,/ /SHATAS/

/TEXT:DEF IS COMMITTED TO ATASCADERO PURS WI 6604; SEXUAL PREDATOR//COM6604/CALORD:06-23-05//OR 2 YEARS TO STATE DEPARTMENT MENTAL HEALTH TO BE HELD IN A SECURE FACILITY VIOLENT PREDATOR WITHIN THE MEANING OF WELFARE AND INSTITUTIONS CODE SECTION 6600, ET SEQ,/X:THE EXHIBITS, #1 THROUGH #10 ARE RETURNED TO THE PEOPLE,/660:06-23-07/6604/
/CAL:6600WI COURT TRIAL/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT IS AT ATASCADERO SH,//X:PETITIONER'S EXHIBITS 001 THRU 010 ARE ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE,//X:THE COURT RETAINS THEM,/CONTD:06-23-05 FOR DECISIION/
/DAWT/DEF:IS AT ATASCADERO STATE HOSPITAL//X:DEFENDANT'S SIGNED WAIVER OF PRESENCE AND RIGHT TO JURY TRIAL IS FILED,/CONTD:TO 06-15-05 FOR 6600WI COURT TRIAL/VD:TRIAL DATE OF 06-24-05/

/X:COURT GRANTS RESPONDENT'S MOT FOR SUPPLM 6600WI PROB CAUSE HEARING,//X:RESPONDENT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED TODAY,//X:AND HE WAIVES HIS RIGHT TO BE PRESENT AT THE SUPPLM PROB CAUSE HRG,//X:RESPONDENT WAIVES HIS RIGHT NOT TO BE CONFINED IN STATE HOSPITAL UNTIL THE PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING IS HELD,/CONTD:TO SET SUPPLM 6600WI PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/
/CAL:6600WI TRIAL/MO TO CONT:BY DEFENSE BECAUSE NEW EVALUATION RECEIVED//MO GRTD/CAUSE/X:PER WI6602,5A, COURT ORDERS:/X:DEFENDANT SHALL BE TRANSPORTED TO ATASCADERO STATE HOSPITAL,/

/X:THE COURT FINDS SUFFICIENT DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE FOR PROBABLECAUSE HEARINGAND THE COURT ALSO FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANT HAS A MENTALDEFFECT OR DISORDER AND REPRESENTS A SUBSTANTIAL DANGER OF BODILY HARMTO OTHERS,/ /CONTD:FORSETTING/
